description: The Strategist: whole-fleet interpretation. Distills all ~430 manifested feeds to trust-weighted verdicts, computes fleet consensus + contradictions, reasons across the entire board (llm_router tier=reason→GLM, upgrades to Sonnet when Claude credits return), logs testable claims for forward grading. data/strategist.json.

schedule.description: Weekday 14:00 UTC after morning feeds land
